description: Airport & Helipad Intelligence — airport and helipad database with approach notes, hazards, FBO reviews, and LZ status

hard_stops.label: Landing Zone Closed or Out of Service
hard_stops.logic: Landing zone is marked out of service or closed — no dispatch to this location

hard_stops.label: Airport NOTAM Closure Active
hard_stops.logic: Active NOTAM indicates airport is closed during planned operation time

soft_flags.label: LZ Hazard Reported
soft_flags.logic: Pilot report indicates obstruction or hazard at landing zone

soft_flags.label: FBO Review Negative
soft_flags.logic: Recent FBO reviews indicate service quality concerns at this location

soft_flags.label: Approach Notes Outdated
soft_flags.logic: Last pilot report for this location is older than 6 months

soft_flags.label: Night Operations Restricted
soft_flags.logic: Landing zone has restrictions on night operations (lighting, obstacles, noise abatement)
